raw_consumer_statement: I am writing this as a follow up correspondence to Citi Bank regarding my Citibank accounts. I have attached documents showing that I have been charged interest since last year even though I reported fraudulent transactions on both of my accounts. While some of these transactions have been refunded, there are still many that haven't and as a result, I am continuously being charged interest and fees on my account. I have patiently been waiting for these refunds and now I am requesting for my account to be discharged and reset. I have already paid thousands of dollars in interest and it has been difficult to keep track of what I have lost in payments. Therefore, I am kindly asking for the account to be reset to a XXXX balance. Thank you for your understanding and prompt attention to this matter.
